criteria.service_seed_candidate: accessible_toilet=yes, parking=yes, and total score >= 8; output remains review-only before field/source hardening
criteria.catalog_candidate: total score >= 5, but not enough for service seed
criteria.field_review_required: low facility score or missing essential accessibility evidence
